title: Protecting Your Identity
drDigitalIntro:
Identity theft is when someone uses your personal information for fraud.
• Never share your full social security number online.
• Use strong passwords, turn on 2FA, and watch your bank statements.
• If it happens, contact your bank and credit bureaus right away.

playgroundTask.goal: You reviewed your privacy settings to protect your identity

steps.say: Go to the Privacy tab to review your security settings.
Ad Tracking is on — turn it off to protect your privacy.
Turn off Cookies to reduce tracking.

drDigitalSuccess: You adjusted your privacy settings! Limiting tracking is an easy way to protect your identity.
drDigitalHint: Click the toggles to turn off tracking settings that you don't need.
